compiled_state.title: UPDATE tests: ticket-lib.sh forward-compat reader (unknown schema_version) and writer schema_version derivation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Context
Story 86ad-f5e7. Update `tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh` to assert the new forward-compat reader behavior and schema_version derivation in the writer. Tests must be RED (fail on current ticket-lib.sh) because the new behaviors don't exist yet. Tests will pass after T4 implements them.

## Test Approach (Given / When / Then)

### Test 9: Forward-compat reader — unknown schema_version logs warning once
- Given: a PRECONDITIONS event with schema_version=99 (future, unknown version) exists in ticket dir
- When: _read_latest_preconditions() reads it
- Then: returns the minimal-tier fields (no rejection), and logs a warning message containing "unknown schema_version" exactly once per (ticket, version) call sequence

### Test 10: Forward-compat reader — unknown schema_version does NOT reject the event
- Given: a PRECONDITIONS event with schema_version=99 exists
- When: _read_latest_preconditions() reads it
- Then: exit 0 (success), event data returned, no error exit

### Test 11: Forward-compat reader — minimal fields accessible on unknown version event
- Given: a schema_version=99 event with minimal-tier fields (spec_hash, gate_verdicts)
- When: _read_latest_preconditions reads it
- Then: the minimal-tier fields are accessible in the returned JSON

### Test 12: Writer sets schema_version=1 for minimal depth
- Given: _write_preconditions called with depth="minimal"
- When: the event file is written
- Then: event JSON contains schema_version=1

### Test 13: Writer sets schema_version=2 for standard depth
- Given: _write_preconditions called with depth="standard"
- When: the event file is written
- Then: event JSON contains schema_version=2 and manifest_depth="standard"

### Test 14: Writer sets schema_version=2 for deep depth
- Given: _write_preconditions called with depth="deep"
- When: the event file is written
- Then: event JSON contains schema_version=2 and manifest_depth="deep"

### Test 15: Warning deduplication — second call with same (ticket, version) does NOT log second warning
- Given: _read_latest_preconditions has already warned once for (ticket-x, version=99)
- When: called again with the same ticket and the same schema_version=99 event
- Then: no duplicate warning emitted (once-per-ticket-version contract)

## Implementation

Modify: `tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh`

Add tests 9–15 to the test suite (appended after existing tests). These tests must FAIL (RED) before T4 is implemented.

Update `.test-index` with RED markers for the new test functions:
```
plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh: tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh [test_forward_compat_reader_unknown_schema_version_logs_warning]
```

Note: The existing test-ticket-lib.sh tests for write_commit_event are GREEN (they already pass). Only the new tests 9–15 are RED.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] test-ticket-lib.sh contains ≥ 7 new test functions for forward-compat reader and writer schema_version behavior
  Verify: grep -c "test_forward_compat\|test_writer_schema_version\|test_schema_version" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] New tests FAIL (RED) on current unmodified ticket-lib.sh
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh 2>&1 | grep -c "FAILED" | awk '{exit ($1 < 1)}'
- [ ] `.test-index` updated with RED marker for the forward-compat test function
  Verify: grep '\[test_forward_compat_reader_unknown_schema_version_logs_warning\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Existing write_commit_event tests still pass (no regression)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib.sh 2>&1 | grep "test_write_commit_event" | grep -v FAILED

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
